## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Jo and Matthew, discuss Monograph project setup and align on roles/responsibilities.](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matthew transitioning from Vappy to Strategy Sprint team; experienced with Atlas and content systems](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [Jo bringing B2B SaaS content marketing expertise; aims for 90% ready articles from CMs](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Agreed to collaborate on content strategy, with Jo leading clustering and Matthew handling research/setup](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Need to clarify specific task ownership and processes for Strategy Sprint artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Topics

### Project Background and Roles

  - [Matthew: New to Strategy Sprint, previously solo on Vappy account](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Jo: Experienced B2B SaaS content marketer, joining GrowthX for scale](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Aim: Jo to focus on strategy/editing, Matthew on research/content production](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [Using Atlas for content generation; seen as improvement over Aerobs](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Jo targets 20 min edit time per piece for scale](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Matthew comfortable with keyword-to-article process](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Need to align on Strategy Sprint-specific artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Artifact Creation and ContentOS

  - [Voice/tone guidelines: Synthesize from industry voices or align with CEO's style](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Company context: Use Claude for generation based on call transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [ContentOS: Matthew built initial version; Jo to handle clustering](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [Keyword management: Manual transfer between Airtable and Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Matthew researched using Perplexity; focused on architecture-specific competitors](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Jo suggests splitting into direct and organic competitors](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1870.0)
  - [BQE identified as primary competitor to focus on](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Matthew: Reorganize competitor table, add ContentOS to shared space, review/tidy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [Jo: Send project update, prepare for content clustering, outline task ownership](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
  - [Schedule CMS/publishing walkthrough with Monograph's webmaster (Matthew to arrange)](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Align on specific process for Strategy Sprint artifact creation](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Review and discuss content clusters once Jo prepares them](https://fathom.video/share/h6GRCFxwA3HA_ahN9mxucEtCgrGTrHRQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2154.0)
